user.title: Set up HomeKit HeaterCooler Bridge
user.description: Choose how each climate entity is represented in Apple Home. Included entities are exposed as a HeaterCooler tile; every other climate keeps Home Assistant's default Thermostat.

data_description.include_entities: Represented as a HeaterCooler in Apple Home.
data_description.exclude_entities: Kept on the default Thermostat, even if included above.
data_description.fan_lane: Which fan modes the three-position HomeKit fan slider drives.

abort.already_configured: HomeKit HeaterCooler Bridge is already configured.

init.title: HomeKit HeaterCooler Bridge options
init.description: Update how each climate entity is represented in Apple Home. Included entities are exposed as a HeaterCooler tile; every other climate keeps Home Assistant's default Thermostat.
